hub.title: The Ultimate Guide to One-Click Course Monetization: From Creation to First Sale in 24 Hours
hub.description: A comprehensive walkthrough for digital creators ready to monetize their expertise through online courses. This guide covers everything from choosing your course platform to optimizing pricing strategies, with a focus on rapid implementation and simplified selling systems.
hub.targetAudience: Digital creators, entrepreneurs and small businesses looking to sell digital products like ebooks, courses, and downloadable content

spokes.title: Course Pricing Psychology: Data-Backed Strategies for Maximum Revenue Generation
spokes.description: Deep dive into psychological pricing strategies specifically for online courses. Includes analysis of price point data across successful course launches and practical implementation steps for optimal pricing structure.
spokes.targetAudience: Digital creators, entrepreneurs and small businesses looking to sell digital products like ebooks, courses, and downloadable content

spokes.title: How to Set Up Instant Course Delivery: Technical Implementation Guide
spokes.description: Step-by-step technical tutorial for implementing automated course delivery systems. Covers integration methods, file hosting solutions, and access control mechanisms for seamless student experience.
spokes.targetAudience: Digital creators, entrepreneurs and small businesses looking to sell digital products like ebooks, courses, and downloadable content

spokes.title: Course Payment Gateway Comparison: Choosing the Right Solution for Creator Revenue
spokes.description: Detailed analysis of payment processing options for course creators, focusing on transaction fees, integration complexity, and payout speeds. Includes practical setup guides for top payment solutions.
spokes.targetAudience: Digital creators, entrepreneurs and small businesses looking to sell digital products like ebooks, courses, and downloadable content

spokes.title: Streamlining Course Analytics: Essential Metrics for Revenue Optimization
spokes.description: Comprehensive guide to implementing and interpreting course sales analytics. Covers key performance indicators, tracking setup, and data-driven optimization strategies for course creators.
spokes.targetAudience: Digital creators, entrepreneurs and small businesses looking to sell digital products like ebooks, courses, and downloadable content
